name: 11p13_WT1_SD
description: 11p13 segmental duplication interval flanking WT1, PAX6 and the WAGR contiguous-gene deletion region. SDs of 5-50 kb predispose to the recurrent WAGR (Wilms tumor, Aniridia, Genitourinary, mental Retardation) microdeletion.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of 10-50 kb at ~96% identity mediate the WAGR deletion; intervening unique region harbours WT1, PAX6, RCN1, BDNF.
